constraints: Only pair people whose availability windows overlap by at least 30 minutes.
Avoid repeating a pairing from history.json where possible.
Maximize the number of people matched; break ties by maximizing total shared lunch time.

groups.note: Full 60-minute overlap; this pair has not met before.
Full 60-minute overlap. Carol+Dave have not met; note that Bob+Dave met on 2026-06-02, so this avoids that repeat.

unmatched.name: Ivan
unmatched.reason: Ivan's window (12:00-13:00) does not overlap enough with anyone who could still be paired. It overlaps Alice and Bob (11:30-12:30) by only 30 minutes and only touches Carol/Dave (13:00-14:00) at the 13:00 boundary (0 minutes of real overlap). With an odd number of available people (5), exactly one person cannot be matched. The best possible outcome pairs the two strongly-overlapping couples (Alice+Bob and Carol+Dave, each 60 min). Any arrangement that pairs Ivan would break one of those 60-minute pairs, give Ivan only a 30-minute lunch, and still leave a different person unmatched — a strictly worse result overall.
alternatives_considered: Bob+Ivan (30 min) + Carol+Dave — leaves Alice out, total shared time 90 min (worse).
Alice+Ivan (30 min) + Carol+Dave — leaves Bob out, total shared time 90 min (worse).
Chosen: Alice+Bob + Carol+Dave — leaves Ivan out, total shared time 120 min (best).
unmatched.suggested_follow_up: Offer Ivan a 1:1 with someone else flexible on a future day, or invite him to widen his availability window next round.
